title: CreateConfiguredTableRequest
description: Request body for creating a configured table.

name.description: The name of the configured table.

description.description: A description for the configured table.

tableReference.description: A reference to the AWS Glue table being configured.

allowedColumns.description: The columns of the underlying AWS Glue table that can be used by collaborators.

analysisMethod.description: The analysis method for the configured table.
